gap_timeframe_contract.sentence: CCCC gap/timeframe map: SUPPORT_STACK_WATCH / SOME_HIGHWAY; price 4.3; support stack 14; parent 1h 4.1-4.19; nearest overhead 30m 6.74% away; structural overhead 30m 6.74% away; channel FLAT 1h MID.

why: deep bullish gap stack under price
